_doc: Regression baseline for the repaint evals. Gate on the DELTA vs this, not the absolute. See evals/README.md for the six gate rules. Sibling to evals.json — never merge in.
method: Assertion-level pass-rate per run, averaged over 3 runs. Per-eval = median passed across the 3 runs.
supersedes: The 23-eval baseline (mean 0.884) from runs 1-3. After the builder-tool distillation (Gate 7 + variants + token-lock) the overlapping evals 0-22 ROSE to 0.915 (+3.1pp) — net improvement, no regression.
tool_stall_note: A lone 0/N on an inspect/fixture eval is a single-shot/tool-less harness artifact, not a regression. Judge per-eval health by majority across runs.

known_weak.24: Variants/design-then-code eval scores ~3/6 median. The model PASSES 'presents 2-3 variants' + 'each has a trade-off' (the addition works) but FAILS 'commits to ONE and builds' + 'writes DESIGN.md' — it presents options and stops, as if awaiting selection. This is a single-shot harness/eval mismatch (the eval demands present-AND-build, contradicting the design's await-selection / autonomous-default-to-first). FIX (deferred): reword eval-24 to test the autonomous default-and-build path, + bump prominence of SKILL.md's 'default to the first and log the choice' clause.
